title: Better Zombies
description: Zombies now look and feel like zombies.
body:
Vanilla zombies are boring. All they do is just stick out their arms and swing them at you. Nothing special

Now it's pretty much the same, but with more life put into it.

---

# Better Animations

![Sunny being chased by three zombies.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/592aaf8bb56ac874467694409f0cf17aee77c4ad.png)

All animations are made with the intent of making it look more like a zombie, while barely keeping that vanilla style.

# More bloodshed

![Alex shooting and killing a zombie.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1077e018c0f67ff86e27bfb31ddb56a9c07047d.png)

Everything, from the sounds, textures, and animations feel like rotting flesh.

# Faithful

![Two zombie skins.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56ad18de02988124168cb55fa31591f6ab9201a.png)

There are quite a lot of variety* in the skins and yet none of them will ever look modded in any way, shape, or form.

*there aren't many skins in the early stages of this resource pack, but skins are added every update!

---

--> Requires [optifine](https://optifine.net/home) for vanilla players! <--

--> Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for modded players! <--
